name: space io
description: In the year 3049, humanity has conquered the stars but not without consequence. The once-united Galactic Union has fractured into countless factions, each commanding swarms of AI-driven ships. In the outer reaches of space, an uncharted region known only as The Void has become the ultimate battleground a digital warzone where pilots fight for dominance, glory, and survival. You are one of these pilots a lone commander plugged into the networked consciousness known as Space.io. Every move you make, every ship you destroy, and every star you claim sends ripples through the data-galaxy. The more you grow, the more your fleet expands. But beware
instructions: Command your ship through deep space destroy enemies and become the largest fleet in the arena Desktop Web Version Mouse Move Direct your ship rsquo s flight path your ship follows your cursor Left Click Spacebar Fire your primary weapon Righ
